description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a long rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched gable roof covered in wooden shingles. The exterior walls are clad in vertical wooden planks, giving it a traditional, weathered appearance. Along the longer sides, there are three evenly spaced arched windows with white framing, providing symmetry and natural light. One short end features a prominent covered porch with a wooden awning and steps, serving as the main entrance, while the opposite end is windowless and plain. A small side platform or balcony is attached to one of the long sides, adding architectural interest. The cabin sits on a slightly raised dark foundation, suggesting durability and separation from the ground.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, symmetrical arched windows, and a covered front porch. The exterior features weathered wood planks and a small side platform.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the cabin with three arched windows and the wooden plank exterior, highlighting the length and symmetry.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the short end with the main entrance, featuring a covered porch with steps and a prominent gable roof.
description_view_2: This view mirrors the opposite long side, again showing three arched windows and the attached small side platform or balcony.
description_view_3: This view shows the rear short end of the cabin, which is plain and windowless, with the gable roof extending over the edge.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch, covered in wooden shingles and featuring a slight overhang
attribute_window_arrangement: Six medium-sized arched windows, three symmetrically spaced on each long side, all with white framing and evenly distributed
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the short end with the porch, accessed via steps under a covered awning
